title: goodyera schlechtendaliana var. robusta
intro: Goodyera schlechtendaliana var. robusta, also known as the robust goodyera, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodyera schlechtendaliana var. robusta include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
